title: Fragment: The Deserts Of Dim Sleep.
content:
I went into the deserts of dim sleep -
    That world which, like an unknown wilderness,
    Bounds this with its recesses wide and deep -
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: The Deserts Of Dim Sleep.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
